name: JetSend Release Notes - February 2022
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Release Date", "bold": true}, {"text": ": 22nd February 2022"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release, you'll find:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#RN_Multiaccount", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Account Management"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#RN_DMARC_Alignment", "children": [{"text": "DMARC Alignment for Sending Domains"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#RN_Email_Attachments", "children": [{"text": "Email Attachments"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#RN_UI_Enhancements", "children": [{"text": "User Interface Enhancements"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "New Features"}], "data-id": "new-features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Multi-Account Management"}], "data-id": "multi-account-management"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The multi-account management feature enables you to create and manage multiple accounts under single ownership. To learn about multi-account management in detail, see"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Account Management"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here's a quick list of the feature capabilities:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can segregate different aspects of your business into separate accounts without the hassle of management."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The account owner has access to all accounts while users have access to accounts to which they are added."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "All accounts use the same plan and have only one billing cycle."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can have separate sending domains for your accounts or share the sending domains among your accounts."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the ACCOUNT(S) tab of the Account Details page, a new section called"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounts"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "has been added that enables you to add and manage new accounts easily."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountsTabRN.05T5g00000IACkNEAX.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AccountsTabRN.05T5g00000IACkNEAX.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 500, "height": 460}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can use the"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounts APIs"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "to create and manage new accounts. You'll require a Master Key, which can be created on the API KEYS tab of the Account Details page. For more information,"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/APIKeysTabRN.05T5g00000IACkhEAH.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/APIKeysTabRN.05T5g00000IACkhEAH.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image", "width": 500, "height": 377}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "DMARC Alignment in Sending Domains"}], "data-id": "dmarc-alignment-in-sending-domains"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JetSend now supports DMARC alignment of sending domains by enabling you to set up custom return-path for your domains. The custom return-path setup can be done during the verification process of your sending domain."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn more about DMARC alignment and how JetSend helps you achieve it, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/DMARC-Alignment", "children": [{"text": "DMARC Alignment"}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/set-up-sending-domains", "children": [{"text": "Set Up Sending Domains"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": ""}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DMARCVerification.05T5g00000IAChxEAH.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DMARCVerification.05T5g00000IAChxEAH.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Email Attachments"}], "data-id": "email-attachments"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JetSend now enables you to include attachments in your emails. Whether you have been wanting to include a payment receipt in an order confirmation email or send a monthly report to your investors – adding attachments in your emails will surely help improve their usability and value."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The email attachment feature is available for both API and SMTP sending options."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn how you can add email attachments, see"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Adding Email Attachments"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "User Interface Enhancements"}], "data-id": "user-interface-enhancements"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "As part of improving your user experience with JetSend, we keep enhancing our user interfaces. There have been quite a few UI changes in recent times and here's a couple to note:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The suppression list and Blacklisted contacts now appear under the "}, {"text": "Denial Lists", "bold": true}, {"text": " sub-category (In Navigation, go to EMAIL, and select Denial List."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Switch Account drop-down (on the top-right of the application UI) has been vastly improved."}]}]}]}]
